channel.title: Valery Ozenne
channel.description:
Reproducible Science is good.
Replicated Science is better.

item.title: The team is presenting two abstracts at RITS2026
item.description:
Nino Avetikovi and Dr. Manon Desclides are presenting their work at RITS2026 during the session “Innovations technologiques en santé 2”.

  • Magnetic resonance thermometry validation of bioheat transfer model for lesion size prediction in liver tumor microwave ablation procedures by Nino Avetikovi.

  • Investigating the thermal effect of photodynamic therapy for glioblastoma treatment by Manon Desclides.

item.title: A post-doc position is now opened in MRI and thermoregulation
item.description:
L’offre détaillée est accessible à ce lien

Pour toute question, n’hésitez pas à me contacter.

item.title: Hippolyte Salles is joining the team
item.description: Hippolyte Salles is doing his master 2 internship over the spring-summer 2026 period at CRMSB. He will develop new segmentation algorithms and image processing tools for the creation of thermal numerical models for the treatment of liver tumors. We welcome him to Bordeaux.

item.title: Pre-Release-Of-Software-Suite-MilleFeuille
item.description:
The Millefeuille ecosystem is a software suite with a strong emphasis on cardiac microstructure that include:

  • Millefeuille extractor (done)

  • Millefeuille calculator (done)

  • Millefeuille segmentator (on going)

  • Millefeuille predictor (starting)

Millefeuille Services, a private (to be open source after publication) branch focused on the study of structural heterogeneities associated with cardiac arrhythmia.

link to the code

item.title: Charlotte Demeret is joining the team
item.description: Charlotte Demeret is doing her master 2 internship over the spring-summer 2026 period at Liryc. In collaboration with Jairo Rodrigez Padilla (INRIA) and Julie Magat (Université de Bordeaux), she will develop new high-resolution MRI acquisition and image processing tools for the creation of new digital electrophysiology models for the treatment of cardiac arrhythmias. We welcome her to Bordeaux.

item.title: A blog article has been published in 'Le journal du CNRS' on our latest work.
item.description:
Our article ‘New analytical and hybrid heat transfer models for thermal ablation procedures validated by MRI thermometry’ has been accepted at International Journal of Hyperthermia. A related blog article has been published in ‘Le journal du CNRS’. Congratulation to the Smart-Heat team.

link to the blog article

item.title: Presenting at the TractAnat Club
item.description:
Presenting at the TractAnat Club, how cardiac cell structure influences MRI diffusion signals.

link to the youtube video

item.title: Organising and Attending the 1st Low-Field MRI conference in Bordeaux
item.description:
The 1st International Conference on the Use of Low and Ultra-low Field MRI for Cohort Imaging in Neuroepidemiology is organised by my lab (the CRMSB) and the VBHI. This conference will be held in Bordeaux from 25 to 26 November 2025.

link to the conference website

item.title: Attending the ESRMRB conference in Marseille
item.description:
The biannual conference of the European Society for Magnetic Resonance in Medicine and Biology (ESMRMB). The bi-annual conference will be held in Marseille from 8 to 11 October 2025. The following five contributions will be presented:

-

- - -

item.title: Manon Deslides is joining the SMART-HEAT projet
item.description: Karoline Honorato Araujo is doing her master 1 internship over the summer 2025 period. She will develop deep-learning segmentation methods for abdominal imaging. We welcome her to Bordeaux.
